message:
add reverse-round conformance contracts and malloc stress test fixture

- reverse_round_contracts.v1.json: verification report for rounds R7-R11
  covering 20 math families across 9 math classes with 100% module coverage
  and branch diversity gate passing on all rounds
- fixture_malloc_stress.c: concurrent allocator stress test (4 threads x 5000
  iterations) with fragmentation wave and conformance signature subtests,
  designed for LD_PRELOAD validation of the membrane allocator

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
